<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep the PR focused on one logical change. -->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear, short description of the change and why it's needed. -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / adapter
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / internal
- [ ] Other

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] Added/updated tests for changes in `src/`
- [ ] New instrumentation is **fail-open** (never breaks the host app)
- [ ] Commit messages are plain (no `feat:`/`fix:` prefixes, no `Co-Authored-By`)
- [ ] Docs/README updated if behavior or public API changed
